header_comments: Avoid `trim()`/`replace()` here: they allocate a second (potentially huge) string.
We only need a conservative decoded-size estimate to enforce budgets before Buffer.from(..., "base64").
Treat ASCII control + space as whitespace; base64 decoders commonly ignore these.
inline_comments: Find last non-whitespace char(s) to detect '=' padding without allocating/copying.
Normalize and validate a base64 string. Returns canonical base64 (no whitespace) or undefined when invalid.

functions.name: canonicalizeBase64
functions.doc: Normalize and validate a base64 string.   Returns canonical base64 (no whitespace) or undefined when invalid.
